PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?headquarters WHERE {
  wd:Q17278929 wdt:P1286 ?team ; wdt:P1498 ?venue .
  ?venue rdfs:label ?venueLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?venueLabel) = 'nl')
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?venueLabel) , 'egelantierhal'))
  .
  ?team wdt:P264 ?manufacturer .
  ?manufacturer wdt:P131 ?headquarters .
}
